notes: Industrial unit rated for grows with 10+ lights; covers up to 150 m². Internal 4.5L tank auto-refills from tap via float-equipped valve for continuous operation; runtime_hours_max null as continuous supply is intended use. Includes 2 interchangeable mist outlet adapters (central column and three-direction). 220V/50Hz. Marketed as 'silent operation' but no dB rating published. Height 35 cm, tank diameter 32 cm, weight 7.6 kg. Not listed on Amazon.de; available on Amazon.es ASIN B09BNCH6VR. Technology described as high-rotation atomisation by some retailers; manufacturer markets as fogger/humidifier.
